name: The Ironclad
blurb: A resilient bruiser who scales raw Strength and self-sustains through blood.
description: The Ironclad trades HP for power and leans on Strength scaling, big single-target hits, and exhaust synergies. Burning Blood keeps him alive between fights.

name: The Silent
blurb: A cunning rogue who wins through poison stacks, shivs, and relentless card cycling.
description: The Silent plays a long game — stacking poison for inevitable kills or flooding the board with shivs — while drawing and discarding to find her engine pieces.

name: The Defect
blurb: An automaton that channels orbs and amplifies them with Focus.
description: The Defect builds an orb engine — Lightning for damage, Frost for defense — and multiplies their value with Focus and well-timed evokes.

name: The Regent
blurb: A monarch who generates and spends Stars to summon the court and issue decrees.
description: The Regent accumulates Stars as a resource, summons court allies, and cashes in with powerful decrees that swing combats.

name: The Necrobinder
blurb: A summoner who fields minions, sacrifices them, and harvests corpses.
description: The Necrobinder commands a board of minions, sacrificing and re-summoning them while corpse generation fuels recurring value.
